item.title: BII commits $40M to Africa climate debt fund
item.description: British International Investment has committed $40 million to an African climate-adaptation debt fund focused on agri-SMEs in East Africa. The cornerstone LP commitment structures a blended vehicle with a Ford Foundation first-loss tranche.

item.title: Acumen RAF II reaches $90M first close
item.description: Acumen's Resilient Agriculture Fund II has reached its $90M first close with anchor commitments from MacArthur Foundation and DFC. The fund targets agricultural SMEs in sub-Saharan Africa and Latin America.

item.title: Symbiotics launches new impact-investing fund with INGO partner
item.description: Symbiotics announced a new sub-advised vehicle with an INGO cornerstone LP. The structure mirrors the Oxfam-SEIIF arrangement and targets emerging manager capital for primary healthcare SMEs.
